name: United States federal income tax deadlines
title: United States federal income tax deadlines
why_people_ask_ai: Taxpayers ask AI for filing, extension, payment, estimated tax, and disaster-relief deadlines.
why_ai_gets_wrong: Tax deadlines can shift by year, holiday, state, disaster relief, taxpayer type, and filing method.

claims.claim_text: What is the official individual federal income tax return filing deadline for the current tax year?
